problems.diagnostic: Ardupilot_Software (identifier) is not a package or a property set visible or existing
problems.cause: Invalid package reference in AGREE annex
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or replace Ardupilot_Software:: prefix from any identifiers in the AGREE annex that reference non-existent or non-visible packages

executor_steps: Inspect the AGREE annex block for any references to Ardupilot_Software::
Remove the Ardupilot_Software:: prefix from any identifiers in the guarantee statement
Ensure the guarantee statement only references visible symbols: angle, gps_pos, speed, latitude, longitude, altitude
